title: Podcast Launch Kit Demo
script: You've been saying you're gonna start a podcast for how long now? A year? Two? I know because I was the same way. The problem isn't ideas — it's not knowing where to start. Equipment, hosting, editing, episode structure — it's a lot. So I built the entire roadmap. Check this out. Equipment checklist with exact budget options so you're not guessing. Episode planning templates so you always know what to talk about. A launch timeline that tells you exactly what to do each week. A monetization guide so you actually make money. And guest outreach scripts so you stop being awkward in DMs. Everything from episode one to your first sponsor. Comment PODCAST. Fourteen dollars.

title: Teacher Lesson Planner Demo
script: Teachers — I didn't forget about you. I know you spend your own money on supplies, stay up late grading, and somehow still have to plan lessons from scratch every single week. So I made this. It's a Teacher Lesson Planner with weekly templates already set up for you. Standard alignment tracking so admin stays happy. A student notes section for the things you actually need to remember. A printable weekly view because sometimes you just need paper. And a parent communication log so you never lose track of who said what. Twelve dollars. You deserve tools that work as hard as you do. Comment TEACHER and I'll send you the link.
